name: agentic-dev-build
//: Build-ONLY devcontainer config for publishing the outer orchestrator image to GHCR (ADR-0015). The runtime config is devcontainer.json (docker-compose, for the workspace/SSH/persist/socket mounts and path-match). The devcontainer CLI does NOT support `--platform`/`--push` for compose-based configs, so the publishable multi-arch image is built from this dockerfile-based config instead. It must mirror devcontainer.json's `build.dockerfile` + `features` exactly (the mounts/initializeCommand are runtime-only and do not affect image content). Keep the feature list in sync with devcontainer.json.
